title: 05 Gre, Esp, Fra
zine-seo-title: 05 Gre, Esp, Fra - Scenes of Europe, Part 3 of 3: Thank You, Life by Luc Rousseau
zine-seo-description: Discover '05 Gre, Esp, Fra,' the final chapter of Luc Rousseau's nine-month journey through Europe. This zine features street photography from Greece, Spain, and France, capturing the essence of travel, everyday moments, and the joy of wandering. Experience the culmination of a nomadic adventure, filled with simple, intense, and precious memories.
content:
05 Gre, Esp, Fra

This zine marks the end of a nine-month journey through Europe. Three final stops to close the loop: Greece, Spain, and France. Each time I set off as a nomad, spending a month at a time in an Airbnb, I tell myself it might be the last time we put so much into travel. So I savor every moment as if it were unique.

As with the earlier stages, the formula proved perfect: working full-time during the week, then using afternoons and evenings to wander, stroll without direction, meet locals, capture street life. Weekends were reserved for more tourist explorations, for discoveries expected and unexpected alike.

Nine months of collecting simple, intense, precious moments. In short, pure happiness.
